arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target group.

arn_suffix.description: The ARN suffix for use with CloudWatch Metrics.

connection_termination.description: Indicates whether connection termination is enabled for the target group.

deregistration_delay.description: The amount of time for Elastic Load Balancing to wait before deregistering a target.

health_check.description: Configuration block for health check settings associated with the target group.

id.description: The ID of the target group.

lambda_multi_value_headers_enabled.description: Indicates whether multi-value headers are enabled for Lambda targets.

load_balancer_arns.description: A set of ARNs of the load balancers associated with the target group.

load_balancing_algorithm_type.description: The load balancing algorithm used by the target group.

load_balancing_anomaly_mitigation.description: The type of anomaly mitigation applied to the load balancing.

load_balancing_cross_zone_enabled.description: Indicates if cross-zone load balancing is enabled.

name.description: The name of the target group.

port.description: The port on which targets receive traffic.

preserve_client_ip.description: Indicates whether client IP preservation is enabled.

protocol.description: The protocol used by the target group.

protocol_version.description: The version of the protocol used by the target group.

proxy_protocol_v2.description: Indicates if Proxy Protocol v2 is enabled.

slow_start.description: The duration of the slow start period for the target group.

stickiness.description: Settings for stickiness associated with the target group.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the target group.

target_type.description: The type of target that the target group is configured to receive.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC in which the target group is located.
